title: Amtech V2565 3.6V Cordless Screwdriver Kit
features: The Amtech cordless screwdriver set is supplied with 11 x screwdriver bits, 1 x bit holder and a mains charger.
This small power screwdriver is perfect for assembling flat-pack furniture and general DIY tasks around the home, garage or garden.
Forward and reverse function for rapid tightening and loosening of screws and fasteners.
Compact, lightweight and easy to use with pistol grip. 180/min (RPM).
Supplied with an assortment of accessories
description: From the manufacturer Why Amtech? Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your power tools requirements. So, keep your outdoor and indoor area looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details.. Amtech V2565 3.6V Cordless Screwdriver Kit Perfect tool for DIY tasks around the home, garage or garden. The Amtech cordless power screwdriver has the maximum speed of 180 rpm with a max torque of 3NM. It has a 3.6V rechargeable battery and only requires 3 to 5 hours of charging time. This small power screwdriver can be used for a variety of DIY tasks including assembling flat-pack furniture, as well as, tightening and loosening screws. Lighweight Compact Easy to use Forward and Reverse Rocker Switch You can switch the direction of rotation using the rocker switch. To tighten fixings, depress the switch in a clockwise rotation. To loosen fixings, you need to depress the switch in an anticlockwise direction. To stop the rotation, release the switch. Specifications The Amtech cordless screwdriver kit is compact, lightweight and is very easy to use. Maximum Speed: 180 RPM Maximum Torque: 3NM Rechargeable Battery: 3.6V Charger Input: 230V (50 Hz) Charging Time: 3 to 5 hours Output: 250mA Charger You can charge the screwdriver with the mains charger provided with the kit. Plug this 3-pin charger into the mains socket. Insert the end of the charger at the back of the screwdriver housing. Switch on the power supply and you will see a red light illuminate, that indicates that the battery is charging. Kit Includes Accessories included in this kit 11 x Screwdriver bits 1 x Bit Holder 1 x Mains Charger
